accent_strategy.description: One controlled vermilion console signal moving only as a soft vertical glide echo.

dominant_mass_strategy.description: An ultramarine control-wall mass that reads as one institutional cliff.

historical_anchor.description: A solitary control bay silhouette that preserves the gravity of institutional motion.

prompt_overrides.scene_intent: Preserve the gravity of the room while allowing only tightly capped vertical motion.

reflection_strategy.description: A reflective tonal plane under the consoles that carries slight glide and breathing.

subject_anchor.description: A solitary control bay silhouette that can sustain a slow vertical glide without breaking the stillness.

surreal_breach.description: A barely visible division line makes the room feel more like a threshold than a workplace.
